description: Phase 5 vision-critic loop: each round a Sonnet vision agent scored a render of the anchored layout against readability criteria (Purchase/Ware/Huang/Gestalt), then concrete fixes were applied and the graph re-rendered. Screenshots: critic_r{1,2,3}_{full,zoom}.png.

applied_next: route cross-faction edges through PERIMETER gateways (not the centroid) to break the starburst
increase cola group padding 9->20 so faction blobs stop overlapping
stop truncating faction labels; add label breathing room
fan each edge's gateway by its source position so terminations spread across the blob perimeter arc
raise hull fill/stroke visibility so faint blobs (e.g. Steel Warriors) read

rounds.verdict: reads as a more deliberate, hand-tuned figure; residual convergence at Ebon Strongbear is a genuine high-degree hub in the data, not a layout artifact (diminishing returns).
remaining_inherent: hub convergence (one NPC is a shared-item hub for many)
whitespace imbalance driven by faithful spawn geography (dense guild district vs sparse edges)
long cross-canvas links need obstacle-avoiding routing (future work)
